children.name: div
children.textContent: A cinematic mystery tailored to your evening commute. Every choice changes the story.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Maya K. is writing an ending for your Noir scene right now...

children.name: div
children.textContent: "She opened the briefcase. Inside: a single ticket to 1987."

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#9D8EB8" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-heart" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M2 9.5a5.5 5.5 0 0 1 9.591-3.676.56.56 0 0 0 .818 0A5.49 5.49 0 0 1 22 9.5c0 2.29-1.5 4-3 5.5l-5.492 5.313a2 2 0 0 1-3 .019L5 15c-1.5-1.5-3-3.2-3-5.5"/></svg>

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#9D8EB8" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-message-circle" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M2.992 16.342a2 2 0 0 1 .094 1.167l-1.065 3.29a1 1 0 0 0 1.236 1.168l3.413-.998a2 2 0 0 1 1.099.092 10 10 0 1 0-4.777-4.719"/></svg>

children.name: div
children.textContent: "The signal wasn't alien. It was a voicemail from your past self."

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#9D8EB8" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-heart" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M2 9.5a5.5 5.5 0 0 1 9.591-3.676.56.56 0 0 0 .818 0A5.49 5.49 0 0 1 22 9.5c0 2.29-1.5 4-3 5.5l-5.492 5.313a2 2 0 0 1-3 .019L5 15c-1.5-1.5-3-3.2-3-5.5"/></svg>

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#9D8EB8" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-message-circle" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M2.992 16.342a2 2 0 0 1 .094 1.167l-1.065 3.29a1 1 0 0 0 1.236 1.168l3.413-.998a2 2 0 0 1 1.099.092 10 10 0 1 0-4.777-4.719"/></svg>

children.name: div
children.textContent: "The barista knew your order before you said a word."
